name: Free Consultation & Patch Test
description: Skin suitability assessment for semi-permanent brow procedures. We discuss your goals and expectations, perform a colour match, and carry out an allergy patch test.
notes: Booksolo had duration 0 — set to 15min. Free, used as gateway to all SPMU services.

name: Beauty Spots
description: A small artificial beauty mark applied with permanent cosmetics — face, shoulder, neck, or anywhere on the body. Permanent placement of a single dark spot.
post_booking_message: Avoid water and skincare on the treated area for 24 hours. Aftercare instructions will be provided.
notes: Patch test required first — verify client has completed Free Consultation.

name: Freckles
description: Semi-permanent freckle tattoos — soft, natural-looking pigment dots that fade over 1–3 years.
post_booking_message: Avoid water and skincare on the treated area for 24 hours. Aftercare instructions will be provided.
notes: Pricing on Booksolo shown as 'from £70' — confirm whether this is a starting price or fixed.

name: Brow Microblading
description:
Semi-permanent technique for enhancing the appearance of the eyebrows, in which pigment is implanted into the skin in fine, short strokes resembling hair, using a hand tool with a blade formed of tiny needles. Shape and style is adapted to every client individually following their face features, skin and preferences.

In the price included :
• Free consultation and a patch test
• Initial procedure
• Touch up in 5-8 weeks
• After care kit

NOTE: please book consultation and a patch test appointment first.
post_booking_message: Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days. Full aftercare guide will be emailed to you. Touch-up appointment is included — please book within 5–8 weeks.
notes: Price INCLUDES 5–8wk touch-up — recommend creating a private 'SPMU Touch-Up (Included)' appt type for booking that follow-up.

name: Ombré Brows
description:
Semi- permanent make up treatment that uses either a digital machine to insert tiny dots of pigment into the skin. It creates a more shaded effect, rather than the crisp hair strokes that are often associated with microblading. Shape and style is adapted to every client individually following their face features, skin and preferences.

In the price included :
• Free consultation and a patch test
• Initial procedure
• Touch up in 5-8 weeks
• After care kit

NOTE: please book consultation and a patch test appointment first.
post_booking_message: Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days. Full aftercare guide will be emailed to you. Touch-up appointment is included — please book within 5–8 weeks.
notes: Price INCLUDES 5–8wk touch-up. OWNER'S SHEET SAID £15 — assumed typo, restored £295. CONFIRM before entering.

name: Combination Brows
description:
The Combination Brows is a treatment that combines hair stroke simulation with a mist of colour using shading techniques with digital machine. Combining microblading with ombre powder together creates a more defined looking brow than just hairstrokes alone. Shape and style is adapted to every client individually following their face features, skin and preferences.

In the price included :
• Free consultation and a patch test
• Initial procedure
• Touch up in 5-8 weeks
• After care kit

NOTE: please book consultation and a patch test appointment first.
post_booking_message: Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days. Full aftercare guide will be emailed to you. Touch-up appointment is included — please book within 5–8 weeks.
notes: Price INCLUDES 5–8wk touch-up. Highest-margin SPMU service.

name: SPMU Brow Colour Boost — up to 6 months
description: Touch-up for existing clients within 6 months of their original treatment. Refreshes colour saturation while pigment is still strong.
post_booking_message: Standard aftercare applies. Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days.
notes: Client must have had original procedure with Iggy.

name: SPMU Brow Colour Boost — up to 9 months
description: Touch-up for existing clients within 9 months of their original treatment. Light pigment refresh and shape correction.
post_booking_message: Standard aftercare applies. Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days.
notes: Client must have had original procedure with Iggy.

name: SPMU Brow Colour Boost — up to 12 months
description: Annual maintenance touch-up. Restores pigment depth and adjusts shape to suit your face today.
post_booking_message: Standard aftercare applies. Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days.
notes: Client must have had original procedure with Iggy.

name: SPMU Brow Colour Boost — up to 18 months
description: Maintenance touch-up for clients up to 18 months post-procedure. Includes more substantial re-pigmentation work.
post_booking_message: Standard aftercare applies. Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days.
notes: Client must have had original procedure with Iggy.

name: SPMU Brow Correction or Colour Boost — over 18 months
description: Full correction or re-pigmentation for clients whose original treatment was over 18 months ago. May include shape redesign.
post_booking_message: Standard aftercare applies. Avoid getting brows wet for 7 days.
notes: Open to clients whose previous SPMU was with another artist — Iggy assesses suitability.

name: Saline Tattoo Removal — Single Session
description: Lightens or removes existing semi-permanent makeup using a saline solution to draw pigment back out of the skin. Each client typically needs 3–6 sessions spaced 6–8 weeks apart.
post_booking_message: Avoid water on the treated area for 7 days. Full aftercare will be provided.
notes: Packages of 3 or 6 sessions sold separately on the Packages tab — Iggy applies the package code at checkout.

name: Eyebrow Shaping
description: Wax, tweeze, and trim to define and tidy the brow shape.
post_booking_message: Avoid tanning, excessive sweating, steam room, sauna, swimming and makeup for 24 hours.

name: Men's Eyebrow Shaping
description: Wax, tweeze, and trim to tidy and neaten masculine brow shape without over-defining.
post_booking_message: Avoid tanning, excessive sweating, steam room, sauna, swimming and makeup for 24 hours.

name: Eyebrow Tint
description: Colour and depth added to brow hairs and skin using professional brow tint.
notes: Acuity should warn new clients to book a patch test first — handle via intake form.

name: Lash Tint
description: Adds depth, shine, and definition to natural lashes — particularly useful for fair lash colour.

name: Eyebrow Tint & Wax
description: Combination treatment — brow tint plus shaping wax in a single appointment.
post_booking_message: Avoid tanning, excessive sweating, steam room, sauna, swimming and makeup for 24 hours.

name: Lash & Eyebrow Tint
description: Combined lash and brow tint to deepen colour on both areas in one visit.

name: Lash Tint, Eyebrow Tint & Wax
description: Complete brow-and-lash refresh — lash tint, brow tint, and brow shaping in one appointment.
post_booking_message: Avoid tanning, excessive sweating, steam room, sauna, swimming and makeup for 24 hours.
notes: 30min may be tight for this combo — verify with Iggy.

name: Lash Lift & Tint
description: Lifts and curls natural lashes at the root for a wide-eyed effect, finished with a tint for added depth.
post_booking_message:
Keep Lashes Dry: Avoid water, steam, and moisture around your lashes for at least 24-48 hours after the treatment to allow the lift and tint to set.
Avoid Heat and Sweat: Stay away from saunas, hot showers, steam rooms, and exercise that causes sweating during this time.
No Rubbing or Touching: Do not rub, tug, or touch your lashes excessively to prevent disrupting the shape. No Eyelash Curlers: Do not use mechanical eyelash curlers, as this can damage the lifted lashes.
Condition Lashes: After 48 hours, you can apply a lash conditioning serum. Brush Lashes: Use a clean spoolie to gently comb your lashes each morning to maintain their shape and separation.
Avoid Excessive Heat: Keep lashes away from extreme heat, such as blow dryers, which could affect the curl.

name: Classic Lash Extensions — Full Set
description: Individual lash extensions applied one-to-one to natural lashes for a fuller, longer look.
post_booking_message:
Avoid Getting Lashes Wet: Keep your lashes completely dry for the first 24-48 hours to allow the adhesive to properly set.
No Steam or Heat: Avoid saunas, steam rooms, or hot showers during this time, as steam can weaken the adhesive.
Do Not Touch or Rub: Refrain from touching, rubbing, or pulling on the lashes, as this can cause them to fall out or become misaligned.
Be Gentle When Cleansing: Use a lash extension-safe cleanser to gently clean your eyes with a soft brush or cotton pad.
Avoid Oil-Based Products: Stay away from oil-based cleansers, makeup removers, and moisturizers around the eye area, as they can break down the adhesive.
Brush Your Lashes: Use a clean spoolie brush to gently comb through your lashes each morning to keep them tidy and in place.
Avoid Excessive Heat: Keep away from blow dryers, ovens, or any high heat directly on your lashes.
Schedule Refills: Lash extensions naturally shed with your natural lashes. Schedule refills every 2-3 weeks to maintain fullness and health of your lashes.

name: Classic Lash Infill — 2 Weeks
description: Maintenance infill for classic lash extensions, booked within 2 weeks of last appointment. Outgrown extensions are removed and new ones applied.
post_booking_message: Avoid water and steam for 24 hours.
notes: Acuity ideally restricts this to clients with a previous Classic full set — handled manually for now.

name: Classic Lash Infill — 3 Weeks
description: Maintenance infill for classic lash extensions, booked within 3 weeks. More fill required than 2-week infill.
post_booking_message: Avoid water and steam for 24 hours.

name: Hybrid Lash Extensions — New Set
description: Mix of individual classic lashes and small fan-style volume lashes for a textured, mid-density look.
post_booking_message:

Avoid Oil-Based Products: Stay away from oil-based cleansers, makeup removers, and moisturizers around the eye area, as they can break down the adhesive.
Brush Your Lashes: Use a clean spoolie brush to gently comb through your lashes each morning to keep them tidy and in place.
Avoid Excessive Heat: Keep away from blow dryers, ovens, or any high heat directly on your lashes.
Schedule Refills: Lash extensions naturally shed with your natural lashes. Schedule refills every 2-3 weeks to maintain fullness and health of your lashes.

Brush Your Lashes: Use a clean spoolie brush to gently comb through your lashes each morning to keep them tidy and in place.
Avoid Excessive Heat: Keep away from blow dryers, ovens, or any high heat directly on your lashes.
Schedule Refills: Lash extensions naturally shed with your natural lashes. Schedule refills every 2-3 weeks to maintain fullness and health of your lashes.

name: Lash Extension Removal
description: Professional removal of all lash extensions without damage to the natural lashes.

name: Men's Facial
description: The Men’s Facial is a revitalizing treatment tailored specifically for men’s skin, targeting issues like clogged pores, rough texture, and irritation from shaving. This facial includes a deep cleanse, exfoliation to remove dead skin cells, and a soothing mask to reduce redness and inflammation. It’s designed to hydrate, smooth, and refresh the skin, addressing common concerns such as ingrown hairs and environmental stress. Ideal for all skin types, this treatment leaves the face feeling clean, energized, and healthier-looking. Perfect for men who want a straightforward yet effective skincare experience.
post_booking_message: Arrive with a clean-shaven face if possible, or with day-old growth — avoid shaving immediately before.
notes: Booksolo lists 65min/£65 — verify duration with Iggy (round 60min or 75min more typical).

name: Deep Cleansing Facial
description: A deep cleansing facial is a thorough skin treatment designed to remove impurities, toxins, and dead skin cells from the face. It typically involves cleansing, exfoliation, steam, extractions, and a mask suited to each individual skin needs, leaving the skin refreshed, clear, and rejuvenated. Ideal for congested skin, this facial helps to unclog pores, reduce breakouts, and improve overall skin texture and tone. It can be the starter facial to set a treatment plan and prepare your skin for more advanced facials.
post_booking_message:
SPF50 for all clients
No swimming for 48h
-No excessive exercise, heat treatments and makeup for 48 hours
No other facial treatments for at least one week
Stay well hydrated

name: Dermaplaning
description:
Dermaplaning is a manual exfoliation procedure that gently abrades the dead layers of the skin using a surgical blade. The procedure aims to increase the absorption of skincare products and diminish fine lines and wrinkles. The treatment creates a healthy glow and a radiant complexion.
Dermaplane aims to make your skins surface smooth, youthful and radiant. It is also used to remove "peach fuzz" the short soft vellus nonterminal hair from your face.
. Perfect for clients with congested, dry and dull skin.
- For those requiring a deep exfoliation.
- Not suitable for those with active breakouts
post_booking_message:
SPF50 for all clients
No swimming for 7 days
-No excessive exercise, heat treatments and makeup for 48 hours
No exfoliation for 7 days
No other facial treatments for at least 2 weeks
Avoid products such as Retinol for 7 days before/ after
Stay well hydrated

name: Microneedling
description:
Microneedling is a treatment used on the face& bodyspecifically targeting acne scarring, pore size and fine lines & wrinkles. The act of Microneedling creates multiple superficial puncture wounds, releasing growth factors
that stimulate the fibroblasts creating new collagen and elastin.
The aim of the treatment is to traumatise the skin without collateral damage to the epidermis and healthy tissue.
The recovery is rapid with very little downtime, residual pain or discomfort. Microneedling increases the availability of cell nutrients and helps to strengthen the collagen in vessel walls and connective tissue.
It increases the density of the epidermis lessening the appearance of broken capillaries.

BENFFITS
• Minimises fine lines and wrinkles
• Improves acne scarring
• Minimises pore size
• Improves texture and tone
• Rejuvenates the skin
• Encourages the production of collagen

Not suitable for clients with active breakouts.
post_booking_message:
SPF50 for all clients
No swimming for 7 days
-No excessive exercise, heat treatments and makeup for 48 hours
No exfoliation for 7 days
No other facial treatments for at least 2 weeks
Avoid products such as Retinol for 7 days before/ after
Stay well hydrated
notes: Pairs with the 'Microneedling: Skin Boosters' add-on (see Add-ons tab).

name: Million Dollar Facial
description:
Million Dollar Facial is a luxurious facial where science meets indulgence. Working the skin from the outside in, it has been designed to deeply exfoliate dead skin cells, remove non-terminal hair, flush toxins, increase cell turnover and stimulate collagen production.
Our Million-dollar facial treatment is a 10-step unique protocol which combines dermaplaning, skin needling and lymphatic drainage massage to leave clients looking and feeling a million dollars.
- This facial will help to target pigmentation, fine lines, wrinkles, dull skin and scarring.
- Combats and reduces signs of aging revealing a smooth and more even toned complexion.
- Not suitable for clients with active breakouts.
post_booking_message: Avoid sun exposure for 48 hours. Full at-home regimen will be discussed.
image_note: Use Million Dollar branded imagery — Iggy is licensed
notes: Iggy holds a Million Dollar Facial license — verify branding compliance.

name: Immaculate Peel
description:
A chemical peel enhances and smoothens the texture of the skin. It is an effective treatment for facial blemishes, wrinkles and uneven pigmentation, problematic skin and pustules. They exfoliate the outer layers of dead skin, revealing a new skin layer with improved tone, texture and colour.

It is designed to give near immediate results without the downtime often associated with chemical peels. Immaculate Peels have been developed to support improvements to problematic, inflamed, irritated oily or spot prone skin types to help calm, heal and restore a more-healthy calm appearance.

CONCERNS
• Active breakouts, blackheads, comedones, rough texture and enlarged pores
• Photodamaged skin, acne scarring, pigmentation, dull skin, fine lines
• Aging skin, loss of elasticity, pigmentation, age spots, dry skin, oxative stress ( lifestyle& pollution ), fine lines & wrinkles


BENEFITS OF CHEMICAL PEELS
• One of the most popular non-invasive treatments available.
• No downtime, no peeling.
• Speedy treatment.
• Powerful antioxidant & antimicrobial properties.

Can help:
• Fine lines,
• Uneven skin tone and texture,
• Pigmentation and photodamage.
post_booking_message:
SPF50 for all clients
No swimming for 7 days
-No excessive exercise, heat treatments and makeup for 48 hours
No exfoliation for 7 days
No other facial treatments for at least 2 weeks
Avoid products such as Retinol for 7 days before/ after
Stay well hydrated

name: PregnaCare Facial
description: The Pampering Cleansing & Hydrating Facial for Pregnant Women is a gentle, nourishing treatment designed to address the unique skincare needs of expectant mothers. This facial uses pregnancy-safe products to deeply cleanse, hydrate, and soothe sensitive skin without any harsh chemicals. It includes a gentle cleanse, light exfoliation, pore cleanse, calming mask, and a hydrating serum to restore moisture, leaving skin soft, glowing, and refreshed. Perfect for relieving dryness, sensitivity, and hormonal skin changes, this facial is a safe, relaxing escape for moms-to-be looking for a radiant, healthy complexion.
post_booking_message: Please let us know which trimester you're in when booking.
notes: Consider a pregnancy-specific intake form to confirm trimester and any complications.

name: Million Dollar Miracle Mask
description:
Million Dollar Miracle Mask is a ground breaking facial mask packed with clinically proven ingredients. Leaving skin tighter, firmer and brighter.

The formula stimulates plasma into the deeper levels of the skin in order to enhance cellular renewal. Using the latest in peptide technology, this Miracle Mask has the unique ability to create micro circulation, promote collagen and detoxify skin. By helping to promote keratinocytes, collagen and elastin, the skin can remove impurities and provide a youthful appearance

Treatment can be combined with Dermaplaning.

- Suitable for all skin types
- Perfect to have 72 hours before a special occasion
- Leaves skin tighter, firmer and brighter
post_booking_message:
SPF50 for all clients
No swimming for 48h
-No excessive exercise, heat treatments and makeup for 48 hours
No other facial treatments for at least one week
Stay well hydrated

name: Back Cleansing Facial
description: A back cleansing facial is a targeted treatment that focuses on deep cleaning the skin on the back, an area prone to breakouts, clogged pores, and uneven texture. This facial typically includes cleansing, exfoliation, steam, and extractions to remove impurities and excess oil, followed by a soothing mask to hydrate and calm the skin. It helps to clear acne, reduce blemishes, and leave the back smooth and refreshed. Ideal for those with back acne or anyone looking to improve the appearance of their skin in hard-to-reach areas.
post_booking_message:
SPF50 for all clients
No swimming for 48h
-No excessive exercise, heat treatments and makeup for 48 hours
No other facial treatments for at least one week
Stay well hydrated
